name: Butterscotch Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in butter. Blend in eggs and oil. Add 5 cups of Hot Roll Mix. Stir well. Add more Hot Roll Mix to make a soft dough. Knead about 5 minutes until the dough is smooth.
2. Lightly grease a bowl. Put the dough in the bowl and turn to coat the top. Cover the dough with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
3. Gently press down on the dough. Divide into 48 balls. Place the balls on a baking sheet. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze. Store in the freezer for up to 1 to 2 months.
4. About 8 hours before serving (or the night before), remove from the freezer and place 24 frozen balls in each of 2 unbuttered Bundt pans. Sprinkle half of butterscotch pudding on each pan of frozen rolls.
5. In a small bowl, combine melted butter and brown sugar. Pour half of this mixture over each pan of rolls. Sprinkle pecans and cinnamon over each pan.
6. Cover with towels and let rise about 8 hours or overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 350F. Bake for about 30 minutes until golden brown.
